test_name: Need-state sweep — live vox pops
hypothesis: L2 MCR and L3 TUF/HSE all clear category + comprehension at vox-pop format.
variable_tested: need_state (MCR vs TUF vs HSE)
controls_held_constant: story=CF, protagonist=VOX, format=VP, production=LIV, visual=RAW
primary_metric: First-recharge matched-cohort delta vs control wave
secondary_metrics: BFC, CPBFC, BC, CAC, install, CPI
decision_rule: KILL cells failing comprehension or >20% category misread; SCALE best clean-comprehension cell at lowest CPBFC.
result_verdict: TUF (T-002) is the efficiency laggard - kill; MCR (T-001) ~= HSE (T-003), too close to split
result_detail: CPBFC MCR 3810 / TUF 6184 / HSE 3961; BFC 16/15/22; inst 633/808/860 (gate 200, all pass)
contamination_flags: F2 (TUF) = highest mobile-data misread watch — must-watch UAT. F3 (HSE) borderline hotspot framing.

test_name: Protagonist test — VCF (variable cashflow)
hypothesis: Peer protagonist (real customer) outperforms second-person narrator on credibility + first-recharge for L2 cashflow scenarios.
variable_tested: protagonist (PEER vs NARR)
controls_held_constant: need_state=VCF, story=CF, format=CMPF, production=GS
decision_rule: Keep better-converting protagonist; KILL the loser.
result_verdict: Can't separate - NARR arm under install gate
result_detail: T-004 PEER 4861/3BFC/153; T-005 NARR 3271/2BFC/69 (under 100). BFC noise.
contamination_flags: F5 narrator polished register (POL) — watch aspirational drift that loses L2 register.

test_name: Protagonist test — short-duration
hypothesis: Peer for exam vs narrator for multi-occasion — does protagonist choice depend on occasion?
variable_tested: protagonist (PEER vs NARR) × sub-case (SDN-EXM vs SDN-MULTI) × occasion-cardinality (single vs multi)
controls_held_constant: story=CF, format=CMPF, production=GS
decision_rule: 3-variable contamination — interpret directionally only, not test-conclusive.
result_verdict: PEER arm under gate; NARR (T-007) leans better but unconfirmed
contamination_flags: **3-VARIABLE CO-VARIANCE FLAG** — protagonist + sub-case + occasion-cardinality all change between F6 (PEER+SDN-EXM, single) and F7 (NARR+SDN-MULTI, multi). Whatever the test returns, cannot attribute lift to a specific variable. Results directional only.

test_name: AI render vs live shoot
hypothesis: AI-rendered vox pop (F8) matches live vox pop (F1) on category landing + credibility; if so, AI unlocks scale.
variable_tested: production_method (LIV vs AI)
controls_held_constant: audience=L2, need=MCR, story=CF, protagonist=VOX, format=VP, visual=RAW (matched script)
primary_metric: First-recharge matched-cohort delta + credibility recall score
secondary_metrics: BFC, CPBFC, BC, CAC, comment 'AI/synthetic' mentions
decision_rule: If AI within 10% of live on first-recharge AND no contamination flag → SCALE AI. Else KILL AI, retain live.
result_verdict: Live cheaper/booking; AI ~22% costlier (outside 10% bar) -> lean keep live; AI viable at volume
contamination_flags: AI vox-pop credibility caveat (audience-layer review): AI = peer/narrator credibility, NOT vox-pop-public credibility. Score F8 against that expectation, not F1's live-vox-pop baseline. THE wave's headline learning cell.

test_name: Format test — AI testimonial
hypothesis: TST format AI works across need-states (L2 travel + L3 family-simultaneity).
variable_tested: need_state (TRV vs FAM) under fixed format=TST + production=AI
controls_held_constant: story=CF, protagonist=PEER, format=TST, production=AI
primary_metric: Comprehension test (pre-launch) THEN install → BFC conversion
decision_rule: If BOTH win, lock format for next wave. If either struggles, document why.
result_verdict: TRV (T-009) beats FAM (T-010) on CPBFC
contamination_flags: F10 carries craft-review-pass override (summer/school = contextual hook, not separate need-state). Watch layer-clean delivery vs F9 L2 baseline. Both AI — watch synthetic-look risk same as T-AILIVE-01.

test_name: Need-state delta - VCF vs variable-duration (same actor)
hypothesis: Variable-duration household need (SDN-VAR, F12) converts comparably to variable cashflow (VCF, F4) at matched protagonist/format. F12 is a clean same-actor need-state swap off F4.
variable_tested: need_state (VCF vs SDN-VAR)
controls_held_constant: audience=L2, story=CF, protagonist=PEER, format=CMPF, production=GS, SAME ACTOR (F4 actor reused in F12)
decision_rule: KILL low performer; SCALE better-converting need-state for next CMPF wave.
result_verdict: SDN-VAR arm under install gate
contamination_flags: Same-actor design = cleanest need-state delta in the comparison set. CORRECTED 2026-06-03: was wrongly defined as F11 vs F12 / SDN-WKC vs SDN-WFH. Per Unfiltrr brief F12 is a delta vs F4; F11 is a delta vs F6 (now T-SD-02).

test_name: Need-state sweep — statics
hypothesis: Across 6 main statics, which need-state(s) drive best first-recharge conversion at static format?
variable_tested: need_state (MCR vs TUF vs HSE vs VCF vs TRV vs FAM)
controls_held_constant: story=CF, protagonist=PEER, format=STA, production=STILL, visual=RAW
decision_rule: SCALE top 2-3 by CPBFC AND clean-comprehension. KILL bottom 2. Iterate on middle.
result_verdict: FAM (T-021) wins; MCR-static (T-013) dead; TRV (T-020) strong
result_detail: CPBFC FAM 3527/43BFC, TRV 4132/20, TUF 4706/8, HSE 5823/19, VCF 6353/3, MCR 20481/2 (gate 200 all pass)
contamination_flags: S2 (TUF) high mobile-data misread. S3 Variant (FAM) uses S3 visual but FAM copy — check if visual confuses audience.

test_name: Short-Duration variants — statics
hypothesis: Within SDN, which sub-case (exam vs weekend coaching vs WFH) converts best in static format?
variable_tested: sd_subcase (SDN-EXM vs SDN-WKC vs SDN-WFH)
controls_held_constant: audience=L2, story=CF, protagonist=PEER, format=STA, production=STILL
decision_rule: Pick winning SDN occasion for permanent SDN budget allocation.
result_verdict: Weekend-coaching (T-018) dead; Exam (T-017) ~= WFH (T-019)
contamination_flags: Occasion examples can confuse category-id. Test comprehension BEFORE market.

test_name: Wording probe — S2 Variant
hypothesis: Alternative L3.TUF wording (variant) vs canonical S2 — which lands category cleaner?
variable_tested: wording / category-bridge execution
controls_held_constant: audience=L3, need=TUF, story=CF, protagonist=PEER, format=STA, production=STILL
decision_rule: Compare on category-id score; KILL the loser.
result_verdict: Canonical S2 (T-014) cheaper than variant (T-022) - weak
contamination_flags: S2 Variant per user override of original KILL verdict (in-context rule application). Net destination carried by prior PT line + lockup.

test_name: Short-duration sub-case delta - exam vs weekend coaching (comparison film, same actor)
hypothesis: A recurring short-duration need (weekend coaching, F11) pulls as well as / better than a one-off block (exam, F6) in peer-comparison format. Purest repeat-recharge test in the set; F11 is a clean same-actor sub-case swap off F6.
variable_tested: sd_subcase (SDN-EXM one-off vs SDN-WKC recurring)
controls_held_constant: audience=L2, need=SDN, story=CF, protagonist=PEER, format=CMPF, production=GS, SAME ACTOR (F6 actor reused in F11)
secondary_metrics: BFC, CPBFC, install, CPI, recharge-again rate
decision_rule: KILL low performer; SCALE better-converting SDN shape for next CMPF wave.
result_verdict: Both arms under install gate
contamination_flags: Video analog of T-SD-01 (statics). Occasion (weekend) craft-fragility watch per Messaging v1.3. F6 also anchors T-PR-02 (protagonist) - dual membership OK (single-variable read in each). NEW 2026-06-03: created when splitting the mis-defined T-NS-02.

test_name: Visual-reuse probe - S3 visual carrying FAM copy
hypothesis: S3's HSE visual can carry FAM need-state copy (S3v) without confusing the audience or losing engagement.
variable_tested: need_state + copy (HSE vs FAM); visual held constant
controls_held_constant: format=STA, production=STILL, protagonist=PEER, story=CF, visual=S3 still (shared)
secondary_metrics: category-id score, first-recharge delta, BFC, CPBFC
decision_rule: Compare on CTR + category-id. NOT a clean single-variable test (need-state + copy co-vary, visual held) - read as visual-reuse validity, not wording.
min_sample_size: CTR significance (impressions-powered); not BFC-powered in CT
result_verdict: Reused S3 visual (T-021) converts >= original (T-015) -> visual reuse valid
contamination_flags: NOT clean single-variable - need_state (HSE vs FAM) AND copy both change; only visual held. CTR read = directional on visual-reuse validity, not wording. Mirrors T-ART-01 structure; variable is need-state+copy. Created 2026-06-08.

test_name: Story structure - guided reveal vs on-screen discovery
hypothesis: A presenter who discovers the category on screen (DSC) engages/converts L1 viewers better than an informed presenter who guides them to it (QH).
variable_tested: story_structure (QH vs DSC)
controls_held_constant: layer=L1, need=NET, protagonist=NARR, format=TH, production=LIV, visual=RAW, bridge=WF, same hook premise
decision_rule: Winner on engagement (outbound CTR + hold) at matched spend; conversion read directional only (power caveat at ~Rs 500/day/creative in CREATIVE-TESTING).
result_verdict: L1 films ~3 days live, <60 inst/arm - too early
contamination_flags: Same actor + premise mandated; check VO tone parity so locus is the only perceived difference.

test_name: Audience layer - marzi vs zaroorat (same master footage)
hypothesis: L2 necessity framing (zaroorat) out-converts L1 agency framing (marzi) on the open Meta audience at identical footage.
variable_tested: audience_layer + anchor (L1.NET vs L2.MCR) via single VO word-thread swap
controls_held_constant: story=ANL, protagonist=NARR, format=TH, production=LIV, visual=RAW, bridge=WF, footage identical (one master shoot)
decision_rule: Winner on engagement (outbound CTR + hold) at matched spend; conversion read directional only (power caveat at ~Rs 500/day/creative in CREATIVE-TESTING).
result_verdict: Arms not deployed (Script 3/4 videos)
result_detail: C-032/C-033 no delivery in kept campaigns
contamination_flags: Footage identical by design - do not re-edit cells separately or the single-variable claim dies.

test_name: Category bridge - narrator format (WF vs MR)
hypothesis: Mechanic-first entry (mobile-recharge familiarity) out-hooks category-first entry for L1 cold audiences at the same QH structure.
variable_tested: category_bridge (WF vs MR)
controls_held_constant: layer=L1, need=NET, story=QH, protagonist=NARR, format=TH, production=LIV; beats 6-15s identical
decision_rule: Winner on engagement (outbound CTR + hold) at matched spend; conversion read directional only (power caveat at ~Rs 500/day/creative in CREATIVE-TESTING).
result_verdict: L1 films too early
contamination_flags: MR entry carries mobile-recharge misread risk - watch comprehension (creative read as mobile recharge ad).

test_name: Category bridge - vox pop format (WF vs MR)
hypothesis: Same bridge hypothesis as T-CB-01, tested at vox-pop format: mechanic-first entry out-hooks category-first for L1 cold audiences.
variable_tested: category_bridge (WF vs MR)
controls_held_constant: layer=L1, need=NET, story=DSC, protagonist=VOX, format=VP, production=LIV
decision_rule: Winner on engagement (outbound CTR + hold) at matched spend; conversion read directional only (power caveat at ~Rs 500/day/creative in CREATIVE-TESTING).
result_verdict: L1 films too early
contamination_flags: Cross-check with T-CB-01 for bridge x format interaction (directional). Same MR misread watch.

test_name: L1 films horse race (directional)
hypothesis: Winner-finding across the L1 film line. All variables co-vary - no variable-level conclusions permitted.
variable_tested: None held - concept-level horse race
controls_held_constant: n/a (directional only)
concepts_in_test: JUN26-C-030, C-031, C-032, C-034, C-035, C-036, C-037 (all L1 scripts incl. Script 7 double-scaffold)
decision_rule: Rank cells; feed creative selection only. No variable learnings. T-LRN-01 reserved for the statics learning wave.
result_verdict: L1 films horse race - too early (directional, ongoing)
contamination_flags: Concept horse race per brief; Script 7 layered bridge makes it directional by construction.

test_name: Headline wording - English anchor vs full Hindi
hypothesis: Hindi category anchor (ghar ka net) out-hooks the English anchor (Home net) for the L1 cold audience at identical visual.
variable_tested: Headline wording (one word: Home vs ghar ka)
controls_held_constant: Visual identical (same render), layer=L1, need=NET, story=RR, format=STA; only headline word differs
secondary_metrics: Outbound CTR + hold (engagement); install rate; BFC directional
decision_rule: Winner on engagement at matched spend; conversion directional only.
result_verdict: Hindi anchor (T-042) >= English (T-041); low sample
contamination_flags: Cleanest pair in the wave - single word variable.

test_name: Ad-unit format - standalone static vs carousel (family-router theme)
hypothesis: A 2-card carousel (scene -> mechanic) earns more engagement and equal-or-better conversion than a single static carrying the same message.
variable_tested: Ad-unit format (STA vs CAR)
controls_held_constant: Theme + scene constant (family at router); layer=L1, need=NET, story=RR, production=STILL
secondary_metrics: Outbound CTR + hold (engagement); install rate; BFC directional
decision_rule: Winner on engagement at matched spend; conversion directional only.
result_verdict: Arms in different spend regimes (scale vs CT) - not comparable
contamination_flags: CONTAMINATION: standalone carries duration badges; carousel card S1 does not - format read is theme-level, not pixel-clean.

test_name: Ad-unit format - standalone static vs carousel (category-contrast theme)
hypothesis: Same format hypothesis as T-FMT-02 at the category-contrast theme (Yeh WiFi nahi, Wiom hai).
variable_tested: Ad-unit format (STA vs CAR)
controls_held_constant: Theme constant (WiFi-vs-Wiom contrast); layer=L1, need=NET, story=CMP, production=STILL
secondary_metrics: Outbound CTR + hold (engagement); install rate; BFC directional
decision_rule: Winner on engagement at matched spend; conversion directional only. Cross-check with T-FMT-02 for theme x format interaction (directional).
result_verdict: Carousel arm = 1 BFC noise
contamination_flags: CONTAMINATION: standalone adds plan-options bar + logo-in-headline vs carousel opener strikethrough - not pixel-clean.

test_name: Statics wave learning horse race (directional)
hypothesis: Winner-finding across the June statics wave. All variables co-vary - no variable-level conclusions permitted.
variable_tested: None held - concept-level horse race
controls_held_constant: n/a (directional only)
decision_rule: Rank concepts; feed creative selection only. No variable learnings.
result_verdict: Statics horse race ongoing; C-038 performing
contamination_flags: Companion of T-LRN-02 (films horse race).

test_name: Comparison headline - word order (benefit-first vs price-first)
hypothesis: Leading with the benefit (poore ghar ka net) out-hooks leading with the price (Rs.23) at an identical comparison body.
variable_tested: Headline word order (benefit-first vs price-first)
controls_held_constant: Comparison table, colours, CTA, layer=L3, need=L3-MULTI, format=STA, story=CMP identical; only headline word order differs
concepts_in_test: JUN26-T-047 (8a v1a benefit-first), JUN26-T-048 (8b v1b price-first)
decision_rule: Winner on engagement at matched spend; conversion directional only.
result_verdict: 1-2 BFC each - too sparse despite gate pass
contamination_flags: Cross-pair (T-ART-03 v1 cells vs T-ART-04 v2 cells) is directional only - "1 din" duration anchor and category mention both change. All cells carry Play Store badge + BOOKNOW (APPSTORE/install objective).

test_name: Comparison headline - context clause (duration+price vs +category)
hypothesis: Adding the "ghar ke net ka recharge" category clause to a bare duration+price hook improves install-to-BFC vs the bare hook.
variable_tested: Context clause presence (v2a bare vs v2b +category)
controls_held_constant: Comparison table, colours, CTA, layer/need/format/story identical; only the second headline clause differs
concepts_in_test: JUN26-T-049 (8c v2a duration+price only), JUN26-T-050 (8d v2b +full category)
decision_rule: Winner on engagement + BFC at matched spend. v2a is the "does format carry category without headline" probe - watch BFC specifically.
result_verdict: Adding the category clause (T-050) is cheaper per booking than duration+price-only (T-049)
contamination_flags: Cross-pair (T-ART-03 v1 cells vs T-ART-04 v2 cells) is directional only - "1 din" duration anchor and category mention both change. All cells carry Play Store badge + BOOKNOW (APPSTORE/install objective).

test_name: Retargeting local-proof horse race (directional)
hypothesis: Across 10 real-customer local-proof testimonial statics, which proof angle converts the warm retargeting pool best.
variable_tested: Proof angle (concept-level horse race; person/quote/angle all co-vary)
controls_held_constant: device = local proof (PROT=PEER, FMT=STA, PROD=STILL, STORY=TST); audience=L0
primary_metric: First-recharge / BFC cohort delta + CPBL on warm pool
decision_rule: Rank by CPBL on the retargeting pool; scale top proof angles, retire bottom. Directional only (all variables co-vary).
result_verdict: Retargeting barely live
result_detail: R-060 0BFC/5inst; R-051 no delivery in kept campaigns
contamination_flags: Concept-level horse race - person, quote, proof angle all co-vary; no variable-level conclusions. Local proof = device, not need-state. First retargeting-objective (R) concepts.

test_name: Comparison-format extension to L1/L2 (vs monthly broadband)
hypothesis: An explicit comparison (Wiom recharge vs monthly-broadband lock-in) beats current single-message L1/L2 statics on CPBL.
variable_tested: Comparison approach vs single-message (directional - not an isolated variable)
controls_held_constant: No clean control - benchmarked vs incumbent (L1=T-043, L2=T-020)
decision_rule: Beat the layer incumbent CPBL at volume -> scale + expand; else retire. Gate launch on the mobile-net comparison (T-047..050) maturing CPBL.
result_verdict: Not launched
contamination_flags: Directional, not a clean test. Triggered by mobile-net comparison day-1 spend (leading signal, not conversion). No-price L1/L2 version is a softer hook than the price-led trigger.

test_name: Audience-matched duration-framing packages (T-043 base)
hypothesis: An audience-matched duration framing (L1 marzi worded full-range; L2 zaroorat short 1/2/7) beats the T-043 control on CPBL.
variable_tested: Duration-framing package (device + framing bundled) - directional, not isolated
controls_held_constant: T-043 base held constant (visual/layout); control = T-043 as-is
decision_rule: Adopt the audience-matched package if it beats control at volume; else retire.
result_verdict: Only control (T-043) live; test arm T-065 not launched
contamination_flags: Bundled directional - device + framing + audience co-vary; cannot isolate device vs framing. The clean marzi-vs-zaroorat read is owned by T-AUD-01.

test_name: AI render vs live - analogy narrator (Script 4)
hypothesis: A fully AI-generated render of Script 4 performs within +10% of the live master on hook/hold and CPBL, justifying AI for simple single-character setups.
variable_tested: Production method (AI vs LIV)
controls_held_constant: Script 4 master held constant (script, VO, length, end-frame); control = live master C-033
decision_rule: AI within +10% of live CPBL (hook/hold within ~10%) -> greenlight AI; equal/better -> adopt; clearly worse -> keep the shoot.
result_verdict: Not launched
contamination_flags: Extends T-AILIVE-01 (T-001 live vs T-008 AI) to the narrator/analogy format. CPBL noisy on Scale - lean on hook/hold.

test_name: Creator-Hyperlocal program (directional)
hypothesis: Hyperlocal creator UGC (local creator, own city/boli, RWGKN explainer ending on a city app-download CTA) acquires efficiently and builds local availability/trust salience. Winner-finding across creators, cities and scripts.
variable_tested: None held - concept-level horse race (creator x city x script x hook all co-vary). No variable-level conclusions.
controls_held_constant: Brief guardrails only (3 must-haves: ghar ka net / recharge / aapke hisaab se; city name + app-download CTA; 30-45s UGC). Everything else varies by creator.
secondary_metrics: App installs; city availability checks; hook/hold rate; CPI
decision_rule: Directional: scale creators/cities that book efficiently at volume; iterate or drop the rest. No isolated-variable claims.
min_sample_size: directional (run to min BFC per video)
result_verdict: Creator H-001 live but 0 BFC; 14-day window open
contamination_flags: Creator/city/script/hook all co-vary - directional only. City-locked, so cross-city comparison confounded by market/supply. Not a clean test.

test_name: Ishaaron winner - line vs graphic element isolation
hypothesis: The ishaaron-pe winner (T-043) works as a COMBO of the control line + the WiFi-symbol device, not either alone.
variable_tested: One element per arm: graphic (B) or line (C/D) vs control A
controls_held_constant: Photo, layout, lockup; exactly one element changes per arm vs T-043
primary_metric: Learning: CTR + install-rate. Scale: CPBL vs T-043 + pool median
decision_rule: Only A wins -> combo. B~=A -> graphic swappable. C/D~=A -> line swappable.
cohort_split: Run in BOTH Learning and Scale
contamination_flags: Arm B (T-070) does NOT hold photo/family constant - full-frame calendar covers the family, so B's graphic comparison also drops the photo (intentional, by design). C/D mirror A's family scene. Auto-kill: reads as mobile recharge.

test_name: Carousel on scale (directional)
hypothesis: A good carousel (C-073: card-2 resolution + booking CTA improved) produces bookings on scale - not just a Learning-phase hook.
variable_tested: Carousel format on Scale; card-2 + CTA improved (directional, not a clean carousel-vs-static test)
controls_held_constant: Card-2 (ghar ka net + recharge calendar) held constant for later card-1 hook iterations
primary_metric: CPBL vs Delhi pool median (>=5 bookings) + first-recharge
decision_rule: Clears median w/ healthy recharge -> carousel scales -> iterate card-1. If lags -> stay with statics.
contamination_flags: Copy improved vs T-046 too - read as directional 'can a good carousel scale?' probe, not clean carousel-vs-static.

test_name: ToF-to-Perf edit test -- TVF GAON hot-cut (15s)
hypothesis: A tight 15s edit of a ToF brand film can perform in perf, validating creative reuse across funnel stages.
variable_tested: Creative source -- ToF film edit vs native perf creative
controls_held_constant: Need state (TRV), protagonist (PEER), production quality (LIV)

test_name: Street-testimonial format (directional)
hypothesis: A street-style neighbour testimonial (RWGKN), replicated across L1/L2/L3, acquires efficiently - replicating a proven reference format. Directional.
variable_tested: None held - format replication across layers (directional)
controls_held_constant: Shared format/middle-beat/end-slate; layer-specific open + payoff; PROT=PEER, FMT=TST, PROD=LIV, RAW

test_name: Cut-down survival at scale - Script 7 vox pop
hypothesis: A shorter cut-down of Script 7 (C-078, first 2 beats removed) holds the original's hold-rate/CPBL at scale. Reference C-036: CPBL Rs 1,945, active, 15 BFC.
variable_tested: Edit length (full C-036 vs cut-down C-078)
controls_held_constant: Same vox-pop source footage, L1/NET, VOX/VP/LIV; control = C-036

test_name: L3 AI testimonial - dialect localization (Hindi vs Western-UP vs Awadhi)
hypothesis: An in-belt dialect render (Western-UP / Awadhi) out-converts generic North Hindi for L3 in its own geo belt, at the same creative concept.
variable_tested: Language / dialect (North Hindi vs Western-UP Braj-Khari vs Awadhi)
controls_held_constant: Same concept held: L3.L3-MULTI.PEER.TST.AI.CF, same story arc + fixed end slate, AI production
